violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. PIC restocked paper towel holder during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (dirty food container) were observed stored in the clean rack. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC removed the dirty containers to 3-bay to wash, rinsed and sanitize during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Per PIC an order has been placed for service. -Establishment must sanitize in the 3-bay sink until dishwasher has been fixed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

The areas underneath/behind all equipment/shelving in the front prep area and back storage area have an accumulation of food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -A few droppings were observed in the back storage area. -Establishment shall sweep the old droppings and monitor for activity. If activity continues, increase pest control service to twice a month. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

The lowboy unit in the corner of the service counter was observed with pooling water. The unit must be maintained in good repair. Service order was placed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023
